title: UiConfig
description: config/ui.json - UI geometry knobs (baked into the bundle): puck sizes, snap radii/easing, grid cell sizes, clue auto-dim feedback list. Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6). puck + snap are the contract blocks the frontend ui test pins; clue + grid are additive. Top-level additionalProperties is open because UI blocks are added per feature.

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/ui.json: puck{default,small,medium,large{diameter,glyph}}, snap{ease,radius_factor}, plus additive clue{autoDimFeedback[]} and grid{cell,snap} blocks.
evolution.why: UI geometry is baked and shipped, so a malformed puck diameter or snap radius must fail fast (CLAUDE.md #6); feature rows add UI blocks, so extra keys stay tolerant.

evolution.change: Additive ambient{driftSeconds,shiftSeconds,shiftDepth} block (imperceptible warm background shell timing) + difficulty{order,colors} block (the ascending-bars TierMeter rank order + per-tier fill colour token) for the on-board / landing difficulty switcher.
evolution.why: Shell animation timing and the difficulty colour-coding must be human-edited knobs, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6); both are applied as CSS/chrome from config so they tune without a code change.

evolution.change: Additive chrome{tooltipDelayMs} block: the hover dwell (ms) before a desktop Tooltip bubble appears in the board Command Bar (focus shows it instantly).
evolution.why: The tooltip hover delay is a chrome micro-interaction feel knob that must be human-edited, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6); it is read by the Tooltip component from baked config.

evolution.change: Additive chrome.attemptFadeMs (optional): the duration (ms) a just-spent AttemptRing arc fades its opacity as a life is burned in the board header v2. tooltipDelayMs stays the only required chrome key.
evolution.why: The attempt-ring depletion fade is a chrome micro-interaction feel knob that must be human-edited, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6); it is read by the AttemptRing component from baked config, and the urgency recolour of the survivors snaps (never tweened).

evolution.change: Additive chrome.attemptColors{full,mid,low} (optional): the AttemptRing urgency ramp - vivid green (full) -> amber (mid) -> red (last life) - a fixed traffic-light ramp like difficulty.colors; spent arcs stay ink-dim.
evolution.why: The attempt-ring urgency colours must be human-edited knobs, not hardcoded hex in the component (CLAUDE.md #6); read by AttemptRing from baked config.

evolution.change: Additive grid.crosshair{cell,header} (optional): the hover/focus crosshair wash intensity - percent of the --ink token mixed into the hovered cell's row+column wash (cell) and its two axis-header wash (header).
evolution.why: The crosshair wash strength is a chrome feel knob that must be human-edited, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6); read by lib/crosshair.ts and written as CSS custom properties the app.css wash composes.

evolution.change: Additive grid.desktop{minCell,maxCell,leadRem,slackPx} (optional) + top-level layout{maxWidthPx}: the desktop fused-grid GROWS to fill the freed left/right gutters. A ResizeObserver measures the grid column and lib/fit.ts sizes each cell = clamp(minCell, floor((width-lead-slack)/leafCount), maxCell). maxCell 0 = uncapped, layout.maxWidthPx 0 = uncapped board width (fill any monitor).
evolution.why: Desktop wasted large empty margins while GridMatrix was stuck at its 40px default; the growth params + board width cap must be human-edited knobs, not hardcoded px (CLAUDE.md #6). Read by Board.svelte via config.ts accessors.

evolution.change: grid.desktop.maxCell default 0 -> 104 (cap the grown cell so labels/glyphs stay proportional; freed width goes to the board layout, not to a ballooning cell) + additive grid.label{scale,min,max} + grid.gap{scale,min,max}: the axis-label font size and the inter-cell gap (border-spacing) now TRACK the cell edge via lib/fit.ts scaleClamp instead of a fixed text-xs / border-spacing-0|1. clue.autoDimFeedback shipped default emptied to [] (a satisfied clue no longer auto-strikes; the manual check-dot stays).
evolution.why: An uncapped cell grew to ~180px while axis labels stayed 12px and cells sat edge-to-edge, so the chrome read as broken (CLAUDE.md #6 - the proportion knobs must be human-edited). Auto-strike removed the player's own bookkeeping verb, so it is off by default (the gate stays as config optionality).

evolution.change: Additive chrome.hintFlashMs (optional): the duration (ms) a hint-revealed grid cell pulses (scale + accent ring) so the just-placed cell is noticed even among already-filled cells. tooltipDelayMs stays the only required chrome key.
evolution.why: The hint reveal was a silent hint-count drop with no on-board feedback; the pulse duration is a chrome feel knob that must be human-edited, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6). Read by GridMatrix/NotesGrid via config.ts chromeUi and written as the --hint-flash-ms custom property.

evolution.change: Additive chrome.revealArmMs (optional): the window (ms) the reveal-solution (eye) control stays ARMED after a first tap before it disarms - reveal is a terminal give-up, so it is a two-tap action (first tap arms + warns, a second tap within the window reveals) to stop a fat-thumb from silently ending the puzzle. tooltipDelayMs stays the only required chrome key.
evolution.why: Reveal-solution was a single tap that instantly spoiled the board with no confirm; the arm window is a chrome safety feel knob that must be human-edited, not hardcoded (CLAUDE.md #6). Read by BoardHeader via config.ts chromeUi.

ambientSpec.description: Whole-app background shell timing. driftSeconds = the slow transform drift of aurora layer A; shiftSeconds = the warm opacity cross-fade cycle of layer B (set to 90-180 for 'a minute or two to notice'); shiftDepth = layer B peak opacity 0..1 (keep <=0.6 so the morph stays subtle).

difficultySpec.description: Difficulty (tier) chrome for the ascending-bars TierMeter. order = tiers low-to-high; a tier's index+1 in order is its filled-bar count (rank). colors maps a tier id to the CSS colour used to fill its bars - the cross-app standardized difficulty ramp (hex, e.g. #22c55e green .. #ef4444 red, shared with the sibling app), or a var(--token). The bar COUNT carries the level (a non-colour signal), so the word may be dropped from the badge.

chromeSpec.description: Chrome (HUD/menu) micro-interaction tunables. tooltipDelayMs = the hover dwell in milliseconds before a desktop Tooltip bubble appears in the board Command Bar (a focus always shows it instantly). attemptFadeMs = the duration in milliseconds a just-spent AttemptRing arc fades its opacity as a life is burned (the urgency recolour of the survivors snaps, never tweens). hintFlashMs = the duration in milliseconds a hint-revealed grid cell pulses (scale + accent ring) so it is noticed among filled cells. revealArmMs = the window in milliseconds the reveal-solution (eye) control stays armed after a first tap before disarming (reveal is a two-tap terminal action so a mis-tap cannot silently end the puzzle). attemptColors = the AttemptRing urgency ramp full/mid/low (vivid green -> amber -> red), a fixed traffic-light ramp like difficulty.colors. Feel knobs, human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6).

gridCrosshairSpec.description: Hover/focus crosshair wash intensity. cell = percent (0..100) of the --ink token mixed into the hovered cell's row+column wash; header = percent mixed into the two axis-header wash (a touch stronger, since the header highlight is the primary 'which pairing' cue on glyph axes). Read by lib/crosshair.ts, written as CSS custom properties.

gridDesktopSpec.description: Desktop fused-grid growth. minCell = the floor cell edge (px) below which the grid scrolls instead of shrinking; maxCell = the ceiling cell edge (px), or 0 for UNCAPPED (fill any monitor); leadRem = the two fixed lead label columns reserved from the width (rem); slackPx = a small margin so a group border never trips a 1px overflow. Read by Board.svelte + lib/fit.ts.

gridScaleSpec.description: A grid chrome dimension (px) that TRACKS the cell edge so it stays proportional to a grown cell: px = round(cell * scale) clamped to [min, max]. Used for the axis-label font (grid.label) and the inter-cell gap (grid.gap). Read by Board.svelte via lib/fit.ts scaleClamp.

layoutSpec.description: Board layout tunables. maxWidthPx caps the whole board width on desktop; 0 = uncapped (fill the viewport so the grown grid + rails use every pixel).
